recommendations.title: The Counterfeiters
recommendations.overview: The story of Jewish counterfeiter Salomon Sorowitsch, who was coerced into assisting the Nazi operation of the Sachsenhausen concentration camp during World War II.

recommendations.title: Deadfall
recommendations.overview: A thriller that follows two siblings who decide to fend for themselves in the wake of a botched casino heist, and their unlikely reunion during another family's Thanksgiving celebration.

recommendations.title: Cold Hell
recommendations.overview: A young Vienna-based taxi driver of Turkish origin witnesses an extremely brutal murder. The perpetrator, a serial killer, makes eye contact with her; a deadly game of cat-and-mouse ensues.

recommendations.title: Patient Zero
recommendations.overview: After an unprecedented global pandemic has turned the majority of humankind into violent infected beings, Morgan, a man gifted with the ability to speak the infected's new language, leads the last survivors on a hunt for patient zero and a cure.

recommendations.title: Anatomy 2
recommendations.overview: The doctor and soccer player in the leisure time Jo Hauser decides to move to Berlin and be an intern in a famous clinic, expecting to increase his knowledge and expertize, and help his handicap brother Willi Hauser. He joins a secret fraternity of d

recommendations.title: Icefall
recommendations.overview: A young Indigenous game warden arrests an infamous poacher only to discover that the poacher knows the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars that has crashed in a frozen lake. When a group of criminals and dirty cops are alerted to the poa

recommendations.title: Vital
recommendations.overview: A young man awakens in the hospital after an accident wipes his memory. Fascinated by a textbook full of drawings of dissections, Hiroshi is drawn to medical school. There he catches the eye of a fellow student, but it's another who becomes his obses

recommendations.title: The Student
recommendations.overview: A high school student becomes convinced that the world is lost to evil and begins to challenge the morals and beliefs of the adults surrounding him.

recommendations.title: American Mary
recommendations.overview: A young medical student struggling to pay tuition is drawn into the shady world of underground body-modification.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn IV: The Gathering
recommendations.overview: A bright young medical student must solve the frightening mystery that plagues the children of a small Midwestern town.
